title: rosa × dumetorum subsp. solstitialis
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subsp. solstitialis, also known as the wild rose or solstitial rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a fragrant, thorny shrub with pink to white flowers and is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Rosa × dumetorum subsp. solstitialis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote healthy skin and hair, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health benefits. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers and leaves can be used in topical creams and ointments for skin and hair care.
